hero_desc: Tools built for two: diagnostics, daily practices, AI consultant, and a development plan based on your real data.
feat_diagnostics_desc: A 10-level assessment system across 6 key relationship areas. Take it together — get an honest analysis of strengths and growth points.
feat_index_desc: A live indicator of your relationship health. Trends and a breakdown by area after every session.
feat_practices_desc: 5 short exercises every day that strengthen your bond. Takes 5–15 minutes and adapts to your level.
feat_academy_desc: Articles, skills, and programs on relationship psychology. Learn at your own pace — alone or together.
feat_ai_desc: A personal relationship advisor — available any time. Ask about anything and get thoughtful answers.
feat_mediation_desc: Neutral conflict analysis from both sides. Seeing your partner's perspective is the first step toward understanding.
feat_analytics_desc: History of all diagnostics and PDF reports. See how you've grown and what has changed.
value_two_desc: Every tool requires both partners. This isn't a solo course — it's a platform for a couple.
value_honest_desc: The platform doesn't grade or criticize. It helps you understand yourself and your partner — as you are.
value_steps_desc: Every tool leads to action: a practice, a conversation, an insight. Real tasks, not abstract advice.
cta_desc: First step — take the assessment together. About 15 minutes each.
no_couple_cta_desc: Create a couple to unlock all platform tools
